subcodes.first_line: O servant of justice! Your missive brought joy to my heart. Praise be to God, through the power of the Word of God and the flowing pen of the Most High [3.5s]... ...Praise be to God that through the power of the divine Word and the voice of the supreme Pen, thou wert saved from the waves of destruction
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دادخدا نامه وداد سرور فواد بخشید الحمد لله بقوه کلمه الله و صریر قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @eulogies; reminiscences
